en: Now Moses and the elders of Israel commanded the people, saying, "Keep the whole commandment that I command you today.
zh: 摩西和以色列的長老吩咐人民：“你們要遵守我今日吩咐你們的一切誡命。

en: And on the day you cross over the Jordan to the land that the LORD your God is giving you, you shall set up large stones and plaster them with plaster.
zh: 將來你們過約旦河，到了耶和華你的 神賜給你的土地的那一天，你要立起幾塊大石頭，墁上石灰。

en: And you shall write on them all the words of this law, when you cross over to enter the land that the LORD your God is giving you, a land flowing with milk and honey, as the LORD, the God of your fathers, has promised you.
zh: 你過河以後，要把這律法的一切話都寫在石頭上面，使你可以進入耶和華你的 神賜給你的土地，就是流奶與蜜的地，正如耶和華你列祖的 神應許你的。

en: And when you have crossed over the Jordan, you shall set up these stones, concerning which I command you today, on Mount Ebal, and you shall plaster them with plaster.
zh: 所以，將來你們過了約旦河，就要在以巴路山上，照著我今日吩咐你們的，把這些石頭立起來，墁上石灰。

en: And there you shall build an altar to the LORD your God, an altar of stones. You shall wield no iron tool on them;
zh: 在那裡你要為耶和華你的 神築一座石壇，在石頭上你不可動鐵器。

en: you shall build an altar to the LORD your God of uncut stones. And you shall offer burnt offerings on it to the LORD your God,
zh: 你要用沒有鑿過的整塊石頭築耶和華你的 神的壇；在壇上你要獻上燔祭給耶和華你的 神；

en: and you shall sacrifice peace offerings and shall eat there, and you shall rejoice before the LORD your God.
zh: 又要獻上平安祭，並且在那裡吃喝；也要在耶和華你的 神面前歡樂。

en: And you shall write on the stones all the words of this law very plainly."
zh: 你要把這律法的一切話，都清清楚楚寫在石頭上。”

en: Then Moses and the Levitical priests said to all Israel, "Keep silence and hear, O Israel: this day you have become the people of the LORD your God.
zh: 摩西和利未支派的祭司對以色列眾人說：“以色列啊，要默默靜聽；今日你已經成為耶和華你的 神的子民了。

en: You shall therefore obey the voice of the LORD your God, keeping his commandments and his statutes, which I command you today."
zh: 所以你要聽從耶和華你的 神的話，遵行他的誡命和律例，就是我今日吩咐你的。”

en: That day Moses charged the people, saying,
zh: 那天摩西又吩咐人民：

en: "When you have crossed over the Jordan, these shall stand on Mount Gerizim to bless the people: Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issachar, Joseph, and Benjamin.
zh: “你們過了約旦河以後，西緬、利未、猶大、以薩迦、約瑟、便雅憫等支派的人，要站在基利心山上為人民祝福；

en: And these shall stand on Mount Ebal for the curse: Reuben, Gad, Asher, Zebulun, Dan, and Naphtali.
zh: 流本、迦得、亞設、西布倫、但、拿弗他利等支派的人，要站在以巴路山上宣布咒詛的話。

en: And the Levites shall declare to all the men of Israel in a loud voice:
zh: 利未人要向以色列眾人大聲說：

en: "'Cursed be the man who makes a carved or cast metal image, an abomination to the LORD, a thing made by the hands of a craftsman, and sets it up in secret.' And all the people shall answer and say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘製造耶和華厭惡的雕像或鑄像，工人手中做的，並且在暗處設立的，那人必受咒詛。’眾民都要應聲說：‘阿們。’

en: "'Cursed be anyone who dishonors his father or his mother.' And all the people shall say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘輕慢父母的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

en: "'Cursed be anyone who moves his neighbor's landmark.' And all the people shall say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘移動鄰舍地界的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

en: "'Cursed be anyone who misleads a blind man on the road.' And all the people shall say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘使瞎子走錯路的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

en: "'Cursed be anyone who perverts the justice due to the sojourner, the fatherless, and the widow.' And all the people shall say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘對寄居的和孤兒寡婦屈枉正直的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

en: "'Cursed be anyone who lies with his father's wife, because he has uncovered his father's nakedness.' And all the people shall say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘和父親的妻子同寢的，必受咒詛，因為他揭開了他父親的衣襟。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

en: "'Cursed be anyone who lies with any kind of animal.' And all the people shall say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘和任何野獸同寢的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

en: "'Cursed be anyone who lies with his sister, whether the daughter of his father or the daughter of his mother.' And all the people shall say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘和同父異母，或是同母異父的姊妹同寢的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

en: "'Cursed be anyone who lies with his mother-in-law.' And all the people shall say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘和岳母同寢的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

en: "'Cursed be anyone who strikes down his neighbor in secret.' And all the people shall say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘暗中殺害鄰舍的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

en: "'Cursed be anyone who takes a bribe to shed innocent blood.' And all the people shall say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘接受賄賂殺人，流無辜人的血的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’

en: "'Cursed be anyone who does not confirm the words of this law by doing them.' And all the people shall say, 'Amen.'
zh: “‘不堅守這律法的話去遵行的，必受咒詛。’眾民都要說：‘阿們。’”
